feature: TradeHub Favorites, Transparency, Audience, RFQ Transfer & Buy Box Algorithm
workflow_rationale: Major feature expansion adding 17 new DocTypes across 4 Frappe app modules with complex business logic (6-criteria scoring algorithm, HMAC anonymous IDs, PII scanning), 16 scheduled tasks, 13 API endpoints, 7 notification templates, and cross-cutting KVKK/GDPR privacy infrastructure. Five planning documents (Tasks 118, 120, 121, 149, 150) define tightly coupled subsystems that must be implemented in dependency order.

issues_found.description: C1 FIXED: Field name mismatch in _send_notification (notifications.py:408) - read message/channel instead of body/notification_channel. Caused empty notification bodies. M1 FIXED: back_in_stock_notification ignored channel parameter. Minor: counter race condition mitigated by daily reconciliation; redundant API increment harmless; Quick Favorite Buyer delete=0 intentional design; no unit tests (deferred per plan).

phases.name: Child Table DocTypes
phases.description: Create all 5 child table DocTypes (istable:1) with JSON schemas, minimal Python controllers, and __init__.py files. These have no Link/Table dependencies and must exist before parent DocTypes.

subtasks.description: Create Wishlist Item child table DocType (tradehub_catalog). Fields: product (Link/Product), listing (Link/Listing), seller_store (Link/Seller Store), added_price (Currency), current_price (Currency), price_change_pct (Percent, read_only), target_price (Currency), priority (Select: Low/Medium/High, default=Medium), notes (Small Text), notification_enabled (Check, default=1), added_at (Datetime, read_only). Use istable:1, empty permissions array, module=TradeHub Catalog.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/doctype/wishlist_item/wishlist_item.json')); assert d.get('istable')==1, 'istable must be 1'; fns=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'product' in fns and 'current_price' in fns; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Wishlist Item child table DocType with all 11 required fields (product, listing, seller_store, added_price, current_price, price_change_pct, target_price, priority, notes, notification_enabled, added_at). istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Catalog. Verification passed. Commit: 9270c1a

subtasks.description: Create Seller Certificate child table DocType (tradehub_compliance). Fields: certificate_name (Data, reqd), certificate_type (Select: ISO/HALAL/ORGANIC/TSE/CE/OTHER, reqd), issuing_authority (Data), issue_date (Date), expiry_date (Date), certificate_file (Attach), verification_status (Select: Pending/Verified/Expired). Use istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Compliance.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/seller_certificate/seller_certificate.json')); assert d.get('istable')==1; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Seller Certificate child table DocType with all required fields: certificate_name (Data, reqd), certificate_type (Select: ISO/HALAL/ORGANIC/TSE/CE/OTHER, reqd), issuing_authority (Data), issue_date (Date), expiry_date (Date), certificate_file (Attach), verification_status (Select: Pending/Verified/Expired). Uses istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Compliance. Python class includes date validation and auto-expiry status logic. All verification checks passed.

subtasks.description: Create Seller Audit Report child table DocType (tradehub_compliance). Fields: report_title (Data, reqd), audit_type (Select: Financial/Quality/Compliance/Security, reqd), audit_date (Date, reqd), auditor (Data), result (Select: Pass/Conditional Pass/Fail), report_file (Attach), notes (Small Text). Use istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Compliance.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/seller_audit_report/seller_audit_report.json')); assert d.get('istable')==1; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Seller Audit Report child table DocType with all required fields: report_title (Data, reqd), audit_type (Select: Financial/Quality/Compliance/Security, reqd), audit_date (Date, reqd), auditor (Data), result (Select: Pass/Conditional Pass/Fail), report_file (Attach), notes (Small Text). istable=1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Compliance. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create Audience Segment Member child table DocType (tradehub_compliance). Fields: buyer (Link/Buyer Profile, reqd), anonymous_id (Data), added_at (Datetime), last_activity (Datetime). Use istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Compliance.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/audience_segment_member/audience_segment_member.json')); assert d.get('istable')==1; assert 'buyer' in [f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; print('OK')"

subtasks.description: Create Buy Box Tier Bonus child table DocType (tradehub_seller). Fields: seller_tier (Link/Seller Tier, reqd), tier_name (Data, fetch_from: seller_tier.tier_name, read_only), bonus_score (Float, reqd), is_active (Check, default=1). Use istable:1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Seller.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/buy_box_tier_bonus/buy_box_tier_bonus.json')); assert d.get('istable')==1; assert 'seller_tier' in [f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Buy Box Tier Bonus child table DocType with all required fields: seller_tier (Link/Seller Tier, reqd), tier_name (Data, fetch_from: seller_tier.tier_name, read_only), bonus_score (Float, reqd), is_active (Check, default=1). istable=1, empty permissions, module=TradeHub Seller. Follows seller_tier_benefit pattern. Verification passed. Commit: 42758a1

phases.name: Parent, Single & Independent DocTypes
phases.description: Create remaining 10 new DocTypes: parent DocTypes with Table fields referencing Phase 1 child tables, Single DocType (Buy Box Settings), and independent DocTypes. Each gets JSON schema with field_order, minimal Python controller, and __init__.py.

subtasks.description: Create User Wishlist DocType (tradehub_catalog). Autoname: USER-WISH-.#####. Fields: user (Link/User, reqd), list_name (Data, reqd), is_default (Check), is_public (Check), share_token (Data, read_only), share_url (Data, read_only), items (Table/Wishlist Item), total_items (Int, read_only, default=0), digest_mode (Check), tenant (Link/Tenant, reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Buyer (CRUD if_owner). Unique: user + list_name.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/doctype/user_wishlist/user_wishlist.json')); fns=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'items' in fns and 'tenant' in fns and 'share_token' in fns; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created User Wishlist DocType with all required fields (user, list_name, is_default, is_public, share_token, share_url, items Table/Wishlist Item, total_items, digest_mode, tenant). Autoname USER-WISH-.#####. Permissions: System Manager (full), Buyer (CRUD if_owner). Python controller includes validation for unique user+list_name, default uniqueness per user, tenant isolation, share token generation, share URL computation, and total_items auto-count. Committed as a71b300.

subtasks.description: Create Quick Favorite DocType (tradehub_catalog). Autoname: hash. Fields: user (Link/User, reqd), target_type (Select: Product/Seller Profile/Seller Store/Listing, reqd), target_reference (Dynamic Link to target_type, reqd), target_name (Data, read_only), tenant (Link/Tenant, reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Buyer (create/read if_owner). Must enforce unique constraint: user + target_type + target_reference.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/doctype/quick_favorite/quick_favorite.json')); fns=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'target_type' in fns and 'target_reference' in fns and 'tenant' in fns; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Quick Favorite DocType with all required fields: user (Link/User, reqd), target_type (Select: Product/Seller Profile/Seller Store/Listing, reqd), target_reference (Dynamic Link to target_type, reqd), target_name (Data, read_only), tenant (Link/Tenant, reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Buyer (create/read if_owner). Unique constraint enforced in before_insert via validate_unique_favorite(). All verification checks passed.

subtasks.description: Create Seller Transparency Profile DocType (tradehub_compliance). Autoname linked to seller. Fields: seller (Link/Seller Profile, reqd, set_only_once), status (Select: Draft/Published/Suspended), seller_name (Data, fetch_from: seller.seller_name, read_only), seller_score (Float, fetch_from: seller.seller_score, read_only), average_rating (Float, fetch_from: seller.average_rating, read_only), total_orders (Int, fetch_from: seller.total_sales_count, read_only), on_time_delivery_rate (Percent, fetch_from: seller.on_time_delivery_rate, read_only), verification_status (Data, fetch_from: seller.verification_status, read_only), certificates (Table/Seller Certificate), audit_reports (Table/Seller Audit Report), published_at (Datetime), last_refreshed (Datetime), tenant (Link/Tenant, reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Seller (read/write if_owner), Buyer (read).

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/doctype/seller_transparency_profile/seller_transparency_profile.json')); fns=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; assert 'certificates' in fns and 'audit_reports' in fns and 'seller' in fns; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created Seller Transparency Profile DocType with: autoname field:seller (1:1 mapping), seller Link (reqd, set_only_once, unique), status Select (Draft/Published/Suspended), fetched fields from Seller Profile (seller_name, seller_score, average_rating, total_orders, on_time_delivery_rate, verification_status - all read_only), certificates Table (Seller Certificate), audit_reports Table (Seller Audit Report), published_at/last_refreshed Datetime fields, tenant Link (reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Satici (read/write if_owner), Alici Editor (read). Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create Buyer Transparency Profile DocType (tradehub_compliance). Autoname linked to buyer. Fields: buyer (Link/Buyer Profile, reqd, set_only_once), total_orders (Int, fetch_from: buyer.total_orders, read_only), payment_on_time_rate (Percent, fetch_from: buyer.payment_on_time_rate, read_only), average_order_value (Currency, fetch_from: buyer.average_order_value, read_only), member_since (Datetime, fetch_from: buyer.creation, read_only), buyer_tier (Data, fetch_from: buyer.buyer_level_name, read_only), disclosure_stage (Select: pre_order/active_order/post_delivery, read_only), tenant (Link/Tenant, reqd, set_only_once). subtasks.notes: Created Buyer Transparency Profile DocType with: autoname field:buyer (1:1 mapping), buyer Link (reqd, set_only_once, unique), fetched fields from Buyer Profile (total_orders Int, payment_on_time_rate Percent, average_order_value Currency, member_since Datetime from buyer.creation, buyer_tier Data from buyer.buyer_level_name - all read_only), disclosure_stage Select (pre_order/active_order/post_delivery, read_only), tenant Link (reqd, set_only_once). Permissions: System Manager (full), Alici (read if_owner). Python controller includes tenant auto-set from buyer, unique buyer validation, tenant isolation, and refresh_from_buyer() method. Verification passed. Commit: 934df84

phases.name: Existing DocType Modifications
phases.description: Add new fields to 6 existing DocTypes, fix 2 fetch_from bugs in RFQ Quote Item, and extend Notification Template event type options. These modifications are independent of new DocType creation.

subtasks.description: Add 9 new fields to Buy Box Entry JSON: service_score (Float, read_only), seller_tier_bonus (Float, read_only), rank (Int, read_only), total_competitors (Int, read_only), is_disqualified (Check, read_only), disqualification_reason (Data, read_only), score_breakdown_json (JSON/Long Text, read_only), improvement_suggestions (Text, read_only), last_winner_change (Datetime, read_only). Add to both fields array and field_order array. Place in a new 'Enhanced Scoring' Section Break.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/buy_box_entry/buy_box_entry.json')); fns=[f['fieldname'] for f in d['fields']]; needed=['service_score','seller_tier_bonus','rank','total_competitors','is_disqualified','disqualification_reason','score_breakdown_json','improvement_suggestions','last_winner_change']; missing=[n for n in needed if n not in fns]; assert not missing, f'Missing: {missing}'; print('OK: all 9 fields')"

subtasks.notes: Added 9 new fields to Buy Box Entry JSON in a new 'Enhanced Scoring' Section Break within the scoring_tab. Fields: service_score (Float), seller_tier_bonus (Float), rank (Int), total_competitors (Int), is_disqualified (Check), disqualification_reason (Data), score_breakdown_json (Long Text), improvement_suggestions (Text), last_winner_change (Datetime). All read_only. Also added column_break_enhanced_scoring and score_details_section (collapsible) for layout. Both fields array (80 total) and field_order array (80 total) updated. JSON validated. Verification passed: all 9 fields present.

subtasks.description: Modify RFQ Quote JSON: add 15 read-only fetch_from fields (rfq_code, rfq_description, rfq_category, rfq_deadline, rfq_quantity, rfq_unit, rfq_budget_min, rfq_budget_max, rfq_delivery_date, rfq_delivery_location, rfq_buyer_name, rfq_buyer_company, rfq_requires_nda, rfq_allow_partial, rfq_require_all_items) all with fetch_from: rfq.field_name and read_only:1. Add items Table field (options: RFQ Quote Item). CRITICAL: buyer email EXCLUDED. Modify RFQ Quote Item JSON: fix item_description fetch_from to rfq_item.description, fix uom fetch_from to rfq_item.unit, add rfq_qty (Float, fetch_from: rfq_item.qty), rfq_specifications (Text, fetch_from: rfq_item.specifications), rfq_target_price (Currency, fetch_from: rfq_item.target_price).

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; q=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/rfq_quote/rfq_quote.json')); qfns=[f['fieldname'] for f in q['fields']]; assert 'rfq_code' in qfns and 'items' in qfns; qi=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/tradehub_commerce/doctype/rfq_quote_item/rfq_quote_item.json')); desc_f=[f for f in qi['fields'] if f['fieldname']=='item_description'][0]; assert 'description' in desc_f.get('fetch_from',''); print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added 15 read-only fetch_from fields to RFQ Quote (rfq_code, rfq_description, rfq_category, rfq_deadline, rfq_quantity, rfq_unit, rfq_budget_min, rfq_budget_max, rfq_delivery_date, rfq_delivery_location, rfq_buyer_name, rfq_buyer_company, rfq_requires_nda, rfq_allow_partial, rfq_require_all_items). Added items Table field (options: RFQ Quote Item). Buyer email EXCLUDED. Fixed RFQ Quote Item: item_description fetch_from to rfq_item.description, uom fetch_from to rfq_item.unit. Added rfq_qty, rfq_specifications, rfq_target_price fields.

subtasks.description: Add social proof counter fields. Product.json: add wishlist_count (Int, read_only, default=0) and favorite_count (Int, read_only, default=0). Seller Profile.json: add favorite_count (Int, read_only, default=0) and total_wishlist_count (Int, read_only, default=0). Seller Store.json: add favorite_count (Int, read_only, default=0). IMPORTANT: Listing.json already has wishlist_count — do NOT modify it.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/tradehub_catalog/doctype/product/product.json')); assert 'wishlist_count' in [f['fieldname'] for f in p['fields']]; sp=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/seller_profile/seller_profile.json')); assert 'favorite_count' in [f['fieldname'] for f in sp['fields']]; ss=json.load(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/tradehub_seller/doctype/seller_store/seller_store.json')); assert 'favorite_count' in [f['fieldname'] for f in ss['fields']]; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Added social proof counter fields to 3 DocTypes: Product.json (wishlist_count, favorite_count), Seller Profile.json (favorite_count, total_wishlist_count), Seller Store.json (favorite_count). All fields are Int, read_only, default=0, following the exact pattern from Listing.json's wishlist_count. Listing.json was NOT modified. Verification passed. Commit: 01c4503

phases.name: Core Utility Modules
phases.description: Create foundational utility modules used across services: HMAC anonymous buyer ID generator, PII scanner for masked messaging, progressive disclosure stage utility, and compliance setup/seed functions.

subtasks.description: Create anonymous buyer ID module. anonymization/__init__.py + anonymization/anonymous_buyer.py: generate_anonymous_buyer_id(buyer_user, seller_user) — (1) Check Redis cache trade_hub:anon_buyer:{buyer}:{seller}, (2) Read secret from frappe.conf.anonymous_buyer_id_secret, (3) Compute HMAC-SHA256(secret, buyer:seller), (4) Encode to BYR-XXXXXX using Base30 alphabet (ABCDEFGHJKLMNPQRSTUVWXYZ234567, 6 chars), (5) Collision detection with counter fallback, (6) Store in Redis TTL=3600s. Properties: deterministic per pair, non-reversible, seller-specific.

verification.command: python3 -c "import ast; t=ast.parse(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/anonymization/anonymous_buyer.py').read()); funcs=[n.name for n in ast.walk(t) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; assert 'generate_anonymous_buyer_id' in funcs; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created anonymization/__init__.py and anonymization/anonymous_buyer.py with generate_anonymous_buyer_id(buyer_user, seller_user). Implements HMAC-SHA256 with Base30 encoding (BYR-XXXXXX format), Redis caching (TTL=3600s), collision detection with counter fallback, and reverse mapping for collision checking. Follows existing code patterns from reviews module. Verification passed.

subtasks.description: Create PII scanner module. messaging/__init__.py + messaging/pii_scanner.py: scan_for_pii(text) returns dict of detected PII, sanitize_message(text) returns cleaned text. 6 compiled regex patterns: Email ([a-zA-Z0-9._%+-]+@...), Turkish Phone (+90/0 5XX...), TCKN (11-digit with checksum validation from kyc_profile.py), VKN (10-digit context-aware, phone priority), Turkish IBAN (TR + digits), URL (https?://...). Replacements: [EMAIL REMOVED], [PHONE REMOVED], [TCKN REMOVED], [VKN REMOVED], [IBAN REMOVED], [URL REMOVED]. Compile at module level.

verification.command: python3 -c "import ast; t=ast.parse(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/messaging/pii_scanner.py').read()); funcs=[n.name for n in ast.walk(t) if isinstance(n, ast.FunctionDef)]; assert 'scan_for_pii' in funcs and 'sanitize_message' in funcs; print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created messaging/__init__.py and messaging/pii_scanner.py with scan_for_pii() and sanitize_message() functions. 6 compiled regex patterns at module level: Email, Turkish Phone (+90/0 5XX with boundary assertions to prevent IBAN false positives), TCKN (11-digit with checksum validation matching kyc_profile.py algorithm), VKN (10-digit context-aware with phone priority), Turkish IBAN (TR + 24 digits with optional spaces), URL (https?://). TCKN checksum validates 10th digit = (odd_sum*7 - even_sum) % 10 and 11th digit = sum(first 10) % 10. All 16 functional tests passed including edge cases. Committed as a88c47b.

subtasks.description: Create transparency utility and setup modules. (1) transparency/__init__.py + transparency/utils.py: get_disclosure_stage(buyer, seller, context) returns pre_order|active_order|post_delivery — shared by Tasks 120 & 121. (2) setup.py: create_transparency_consent_topics() seeds Consent Topic records, seed_default_visibility_rules() creates Buyer Visibility Rule defaults, ensure_anonymous_id_secret() adds anonymous_buyer_id_secret to site_config.json if missing.

verification.command: python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/transparency/utils.py').read()); ast.parse(open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/setup.py').read()); print('OK')"

subtasks.notes: Created 3 files: (1) transparency/__init__.py - Module init exporting get_disclosure_stage. (2) transparency/utils.py - get_disclosure_stage(buyer, seller, context) returns pre_order|active_order|post_delivery based on transaction history; includes get_visibility_rules() helper; checks Sales Order and RFQ Quote for stage determination. (3) setup.py - create_transparency_consent_topics() seeds 5 KVKK consent topics, seed_default_visibility_rules() creates 15 default BVR rules (5 per stage), ensure_anonymous_id_secret() generates cryptographic HMAC secret in site_config.json. All files pass AST verification.

phases.name: tradehub_seller Buy Box Enhancement
phases.description: Implement Buy Box algorithm enhancement: 6-criteria scoring with configurable weights from Buy Box Settings, 11 disqualification rules, tiebreaker cascade, cooldown mechanism, logging, API endpoints, scheduled tasks, and hooks.py updates.

subtasks.description: Create Buy Box scoring algorithm and disqualification modules. buy_box/__init__.py + buy_box/scoring.py: calculate_buy_box_score(buy_box_entry) reads weights from Buy Box Settings (NEVER hardcode), 6 normalize functions (normalize_price lower=better, normalize_delivery faster=better, normalize_rating higher+log_confidence, normalize_stock log_scale_capped, normalize_service higher=better, get_tier_bonus from settings table), tiebreaker cascade (on_time_delivery_rate → return_rate → creation). buy_box/disqualification.py: check_disqualification(entry) implementing 11 rules returning (is_disqualified, reason).

All weights read from Buy Box Settings Single DocType — never hardcoded. Normalize functions return 0-1, stored scores are 0-100. Tiebreaker cascade: on_time_delivery_rate → return_rate → creation. Verified all 15/15 new DocTypes (JSON schema valid, Python syntax valid, __init__.py present), Buy Box Settings weight defaults sum to 1.0 (price=0.35, delivery=0.20, rating=0.20, stock=0.15, service=0.05, tier=0.05), social proof counters on Product/SellerProfile/SellerStore, Buy Box Entry 9 new fields, Notification Template 3 new event types, RFQ Quote + RFQ Quote Item field_order complete, 4 hooks.py syntax valid, 4 seed scripts confirmed (ensure_anonymous_id_secret, seed_default_visibility_rules, create_transparency_consent_topics, reconcile_social_proof_counters), 3 core utility modules valid (anonymous_buyer, pii_scanner, transparency/utils). All DocType JSON files across the codebase valid. Bench-environment steps (migrate, clear-cache, seed execution) documented in verify_integration.py for manual execution. Commit: 16c5d8a

verification_steps.name: JSON Schema Validation
verification_steps.command: python3 -c "import json, glob; [json.load(open(f)) for f in glob.glob('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/doctype/*/*.json')]; print('All DocType JSONs valid')"

verification_steps.name: Python Syntax Validation
verification_steps.command: python3 -c "import ast, glob; [ast.parse(open(f).read()) for f in glob.glob('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/doctype/*/*.py') + glob.glob('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/tradehub_*/*/*.py')]; print('All Python files valid')"
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All Python files have valid syntax

verification_steps.name: Security - PII Scanner Audit
verification_steps.command: python3 -c "c=open('frappe-bench/apps/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/tradehub_compliance/messaging/pii_scanner.py').read(); assert 'EMAIL' in c and 'PHONE' in c and 'TCKN' in c and 'IBAN' in c; print('PII patterns present')"

verification_strategy.reasoning: HIGH risk: KVKK/GDPR compliance, PII handling, HMAC anonymous IDs, Buy Box scoring correctness. Security scan mandatory for anonymization and consent flows. Staging required for 17 new table migrations.

flows: Wishlist Lifecycle: Create → Add item → Favorite → Counter check → Delete
Buy Box Recalculation: Settings → 3 seller entries → Recalculate → Winner → Logs
Anonymous Audience: Segment → Members → Masked message → PII scan → Anonymity
RFQ Quote: RFQ with items → Quote → Auto-populated fields → Items created
Consent Withdrawal: Set prefs → Withdraw → Immediate stop → 72h anonymize
